chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-1241 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 29.12.2025. Mr. Ansar Ali Shar, Advocate for applicant/accused. Mr. Rehan Khan Gaddi, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, Deputy P.G for the State alongwith ASI / I.O Ghulam Shabbir Abro. ***************************************** Learned counsel for applicant/accused submits that this Bail Application has become infructuous as the applicant/accused has been arrested in another crime, hence he does not press this Bail Application. Accordingly, the Bail Application stands disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE Ali.
